pageContext.name: Strange Supreme Deluxe
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Strange Supreme Deluxe!  From Marvel Studios: What If...?, this Strange Supreme Deluxe Art Scale Statue is limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted.  Doctor Strange fans, don't miss your chance to add this Doctor Strange statue to your Marvel collectibles display!
